creator: Cy.Schubert@komquats.com
text:
Can you try this patch? Thanks.

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/pcvs/ports/sysutils/screen/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.77
diff -u -r1.77 Makefile
--- Makefile	23 Feb 2009 21:48:34 -0000	1.77
+++ Makefile	17 Mar 2009 21:59:32 -0000
@@ -31,6 +31,12 @@
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
+# XXX
+CONFIGURE_ENV=  CFLAGS=-I/usr/local/include CPPFLAGS=-I/usr/local/include 
LDFLAGS=-L/usr/local/lib
+CFLAGS+=        -I/usr/local/include
+CPPFLAGS+=      -I/usr/local/include
+LDFLAGS+=       -L/usr/local/lib
+# XXX
 .if defined(WITH_MAN)
 MAN1=		screen.1
 MAKE_ARGS+=	-DWITH_MAN
Index: files/patch-utmp.c
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/pcvs/ports/sysutils/screen/files/patch-utmp.c,v
retrieving revision 1.1
diff -u -r1.1 patch-utmp.c
--- files/patch-utmp.c	21 Oct 2005 14:24:02 -0000	1.1
+++ files/patch-utmp.c	17 Mar 2009 21:59:32 -0000
@@ -1,6 +1,16 @@
---- utmp.c.orig	Mon Sep  8 16:27:17 2003
-+++ utmp.c	Wed Oct 19 14:58:40 2005
-@@ -726,9 +728,12 @@
+--- utmp.c.orig	2003-09-08 07:27:17.000000000 -0700
++++ utmp.c	2009-03-17 14:34:21.326252589 -0700
+@@ -97,9 +97,7 @@
+ 
+ static int utmpok;
+ static char UtmpName[] = UTMPFILE;
+-#ifndef UTMP_HELPER
+ static int utmpfd = -1;
+-#endif
+ 
+ 
+ # if defined(GETUTENT) && (!defined(SVR4) || defined(__hpux))
+@@ -726,9 +724,12 @@
  char *line, *user;
  int pid;
  {
@@ -14,4 +24,3 @@
  }
  
  static slot_t
-
